testcase.classname: API — Items GET /api/items returns paginated item list
testcase.name: API — Items GET /api/items returns paginated item list

testcase.classname: API — Items GET /api/items supports pagination parameters
testcase.name: API — Items GET /api/items supports pagination parameters

testcase.classname: API — Items GET /api/items/:id returns a specific item by ID
testcase.name: API — Items GET /api/items/:id returns a specific item by ID

testcase.classname: API — Items GET /api/items/:id returns 404 for non-existent item
testcase.name: API — Items GET /api/items/:id returns 404 for non-existent item

testcase.classname: API — Items GET /api/items/:id returns 400 for non-numeric ID
testcase.name: API — Items GET /api/items/:id returns 400 for non-numeric ID

testcase.classname: API — Items GET /api/items/:id returns 400 for zero or negative ID
testcase.name: API — Items GET /api/items/:id returns 400 for zero or negative ID

testcase.classname: API — Items POST /api/items creates a new item with valid payload
testcase.name: API — Items POST /api/items creates a new item with valid payload

testcase.classname: API — Items POST /api/items returns 400 when name is missing
testcase.name: API — Items POST /api/items returns 400 when name is missing

testcase.classname: API — Items POST /api/items returns 400 for empty name string
testcase.name: API — Items POST /api/items returns 400 for empty name string

testcase.classname: Health Endpoints GET /health returns healthy status with required fields
testcase.name: Health Endpoints GET /health returns healthy status with required fields

testcase.classname: Health Endpoints GET /health/live returns alive for liveness probe
testcase.name: Health Endpoints GET /health/live returns alive for liveness probe

testcase.classname: Health Endpoints GET /health/ready returns ready for readiness probe
testcase.name: Health Endpoints GET /health/ready returns ready for readiness probe

testcase.classname: Health Endpoints GET /metrics returns Prometheus metrics in text format
testcase.name: Health Endpoints GET /metrics returns Prometheus metrics in text format

testcase.classname: Health Endpoints Unknown routes returns 404 for undefined paths
testcase.name: Health Endpoints Unknown routes returns 404 for undefined paths
